sn28.7:1.1: At Sāvatthī … . The Venerable Ānanda saw the Venerable Sāriputta coming in the distance …
sn28.7:1.2: "Here, friend, by completely transcending the base of the infinity of consciousness, aware that ‘there is nothing,’ I entered and dwelt in the base of nothingness. Yet, friend, it did not occur to me, ‘I am attaining the base of nothingness … .’" sn.iii.238
